name: Jindalee Lithium Limited
analysis: JLL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 60% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.4000, stop A$0.3514, target A$0.4450 (0.93:1) — then trail it.
